headlines: Confidential computing's core trust mechanism is broken. The fix may not exist
NASA says it will isolate volunteers from the outside world for a year
David Potter, the man who put Psion in the palm of your hand, logs off at 82
Amazon Leo constellation nears 400 satellites as broadband launch looms
crew_quote: "Well, at least in here it's nice and warm—unlike that NASA lot isolating volunteers for a year. Bet they’ll be missing a good curry by the time they get out!"
